derive.title: Terminal ready
derive.detail: Open Collections, Boards, or Saves to mount into the terminal shell.

derive.title: Live board mounted
derive.detail: Boards stay live-readout only. Save, Notes, and Bookmarks remain unavailable here.

derive.title: Cartridge mounted
derive.detail: Cartridge runtime is mounted with slot-aware actions when available.

guardrails: Home surface presentation should summarize contract-backed state without turning Home into a raw diagnostic dump.
Home surface presentation does not create new capabilities beyond home-summary derivation.
Boards remain read-only even when summarized as a mounted state on Home.
